zh.lifeSummary: 當John Folcard II於大約1387年出生在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可時，他的父親John Folcard I29歲，母親Alice Of Crostwick24歲。他於大約1406年與Beatrice De Sparham在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1464年在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Folcard II于大约1387年出生在英国諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可时，他的父亲John Folcard I29岁，母亲Alice Of Crostwick24岁。他于大约1406年与Beatrice De Sparham在英国諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1464年在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Folcard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: French: relationship name French Foucquart, from the Old French personal name Foucard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Folkard .

variants.name: Folkard
meanings: 1 Norman, English: relationship name from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Folcard, Foucard, Focard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Fulcher , with which this name may sometimes have been confused. See also Flucker .
2 Norman, English: relationship name perhaps also partly from the Continental Germanic personal name Fulchered, which had some currency in E Anglia in the medieval period.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Folcard II was born about 1387, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, his father, John Folcard I, was 29 and his mother, Alice Of Crostwick, was 24. He married Beatrice De Sparham about 1406, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Folcard II est né environ 1387, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Folcard I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Of Crostwick, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice De Sparham environ 1406, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Folcard II um 1387 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Folcard I 29 und seine Mutter Alice Of Crostwick 24. Er hat um 1406 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England Beatrice De Sparham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1464 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Folcard II è nato il circa 1387 nel Crostwick, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Folcard I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Of Crostwick, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice De Sparham circa 1406, nel Crostwick, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Folcard IIが約1387年にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックで生まれた時，父John Folcard Iは29歳，母Alice Of Crostwickは24歳であった。約1406年にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックでBeatrice De Sparhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1464年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Folcard II(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Folcard I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Of Crostwick(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1406년 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 Beatrice De Sparham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1464년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Norwich, Norfolkshire, England: Norwich, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Folcard II nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Folcard I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Of Crostwick, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice De Sparham aproximadamente 1406, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Folcard II родился около 1387 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Folcard I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Of Crostwick, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice De Sparham около 1406 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Folcard II nació aproximadamente 1387, en Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Folcard I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Of Crostwick, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Beatrice De Sparham aproximadamente 1406, en Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
